languages.text: Иссушенные тела скрючены в разнообразных позах, каждая из которых отражает разные грани невыносимой агонии. Плоть несчастных словно бы служила друкари холстом для жестоких экспериментов, от едва ощутимых, неглубоких порезов до сводящих с ума ожогов. В окостеневшем кулаке одного из трупов зажата инквизиторская инсигния.

traits.locale_text: Иссушенные тела скрючены в разнообразных позах, каждая из которых отражает разные грани невыносимой агонии. Плоть несчастных словно бы служила друкари холстом для жестоких экспериментов, от едва ощутимых, неглубоких порезов до сводящих с ума ожогов. В окостеневшем кулаке одного из трупов зажата инквизиторская инсигния.

languages.text: The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. One of the corpses held an Inquisitor's insignia in its ossified fist.

В окостеневшем кулаке одного из трупов зажата инквизиторская инсигния.

The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. languages.text: 那些受尽折磨的尸体蜷缩成各种姿势，每一种都像是在表现不同形式的极致痛苦。这些不幸之人的血肉简直成了黑暗灵族残酷实验的画布，从几乎难以察觉的浅浅切口，到足以摧毁神志的灼烧伤痕，无所不有。其中一具尸体那僵化成骨的拳头里，还死死攥着一枚审判官的徽章。
languages.original_text: The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. One of the corpses held an Inquisitor's insignia in its ossified fist.

languages.text: Los cuerpos torturados están acurrucados en distintas posiciones, todos ellos con expresiones de dolor insufrible en el rotro. La carne de estas pobres almas parecen haber servido de lienzo para los experimentos crueles de los Drukhari, desde cortes superficiales apenas perceptibles a quemaduras enloquecedoras. Uno de los cadáveres sostenía una insignia de Inquisidor en el puño osificado.
languages.original_text: The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. traits.locale_text: Los cuerpos torturados están acurrucados en distintas posiciones, todos ellos con expresiones de dolor insufrible en el rotro. La carne de estas pobres almas parecen haber servido de lienzo para los experimentos crueles de los Drukhari, desde cortes superficiales apenas perceptibles a quemaduras enloquecedoras. Uno de los cadáveres sostenía una insignia de Inquisidor en el puño osificado.

languages.text: Les corps torturés ont été disposés dans des poses diverses, chacune reflétant une facette différente du tourment insoutenable qu'ils ont subi. La chair des malheureux semble avoir fait l'objet d'expériences cruelles des Drukharis, allant de coupures superficielles à des brûlures défiant la raison. L'un des cadavres tient encore un insigne d'inquisiteur dans son poing ossifié.
languages.original_text: The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. One of the corpses held an Inquisitor's insignia in its ossified fist.

traits.locale_text: Les corps torturés ont été disposés dans des poses diverses, chacune reflétant une facette différente du tourment insoutenable qu'ils ont subi. La chair des malheureux semble avoir fait l'objet d'expériences cruelles des Drukharis, allant de coupures superficielles à des brûlures défiant la raison. languages.text: İşkence görmüş bedenler, çeşitli pozisyonlarda kıvrılmış. Her biri, dayanılmaz acının farklı bir yönünü yansıtıyor. Bu zavallıların etleri, Drukharilerin acımasız deneyleri için bir tuval görevi görmüş. Zar zor algılanabilen sığ kesiklerden, akıl sağlığını yok eden yanıklara kadar pek çok şey yapılmış. Cesetlerden birinin kemikleşmiş yumruğunda bir Engizisyoncu nişanı bulunuyor.
languages.original_text: The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. One of the corpses held an Inquisitor's insignia in its ossified fist.

Bu zavallıların etleri, Drukharilerin acımasız deneyleri için bir tuval görevi görmüş. Zar zor algılanabilen sığ kesiklerden, akıl sağlığını yok eden yanıklara kadar pek çok şey yapılmış. Cesetlerden birinin kemikleşmiş yumruğunda bir Engizisyoncu nişanı bulunuyor.

languages.text: Die gefolterten Leichen waren in verschiedenen Posen angeordnet, die unterschiedliche Facetten von unerträglichem Leid reflektierten. Das Fleisch dieser unglücklichen Seelen scheint als Leinwand für die grausamen Experimente der Drukhari zu dienen ... von unmerklichen Schnitten bis zu Verstand raubenden Verbrennungen. Eine der Leichen hält die Insignien eines Inquisitors in seiner knöchernen Faust.
languages.original_text: The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. One of the corpses held an Inquisitor's insignia in its ossified fist.

Das Fleisch dieser unglücklichen Seelen scheint als Leinwand für die grausamen Experimente der Drukhari zu dienen ... von unmerklichen Schnitten bis zu Verstand raubenden Verbrennungen. Eine der Leichen hält die Insignien eines Inquisitors in seiner knöchernen Faust.

languages.text: 拷問を受けた肉体は、様々な姿勢で縮こまっていた。それぞれの姿勢は、耐え難い苦痛の異なる側面を映し出していた。不幸な者の肉体は、ドルーカリの残酷な実験のキャンバスのようになっていた。わずかに感じられる浅い傷から、精神を破壊するような火傷まで。その死体の1つには、骨化した拳にインクィジターの紋章が握られていた。
languages.original_text: The tortured bodies were curled up in a variety of poses, each one reflecting a different facet of unbearable agony. The flesh of these unfortunates seemed to serve as a canvas for the Drukhari's cruel experiments, from barely perceptible, shallow cuts to sanity-destroying burns. One of the corpses held an Inquisitor's insignia in its ossified fist.
